Assistance section has H2 including grants and assistance keywords with county name
Process section H2 includes county name and eligibility language

generateMetadata function exists and returns title and description per county
Spanish routes have equivalent Spanish headings
No layout component or styling changes

llm_analysis.assessment: The changes match the change request by updating the SEO headlines, subtitles, and metadata as specified.

risks: app/[lang]/counties/[county]/page.tsx:generateMetadata - Incorrect metadata generation for unsupported languages
app/[lang]/counties/[county]/page.tsx:CountyPage - Potential mismatch in language-specific content rendering
app/[lang]/counties/[county]/page.tsx:CountyPage - Incorrect handling of county data retrieval

llm_analysis.notes: The code does not explicitly handle cases where input parameters might be empty, null, or missing, which could lead to runtime errors.
No breaking changes to APIs or contracts are evident from the changes.

llm_analysis.recommendation: Introduce unit tests for generateMetadata and language-specific content rendering to ensure robustness.
